cards.name: Citi / AAdvantage Platinum Select World Elite Mastercard
notes: First checked bag free on domestic American Airlines itineraries for the primary cardholder and up to 4 companions on the same reservation.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: AAdvantage Aviator Red World Elite Mastercard
notes: First checked bag free for the cardholder and up to 4 companions on the same reservation.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Citi / AAdvantage Executive World Elite Mastercard
notes: First checked bag free on domestic American Airlines itineraries for the cardholder and up to 8 companions on the same reservation.
Includes Admirals Club access.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: United Explorer Card
notes: First checked bag free for the primary cardmember and one companion on the same reservation.
Ticket must be purchased with the card and the MileagePlus number must be attached to the reservation.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: United Quest Card
notes: First and second checked bags free for the primary cardmember and one companion on the same reservation.
Ticket must be purchased with the card and the MileagePlus number must be attached to the reservation.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: United Club Card
notes: First and second checked bags free for the primary cardmember and one companion on the same reservation.
Ticket must be purchased with the card and the MileagePlus number must be attached to the reservation.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Delta SkyMiles Gold American Express Card
notes: First checked bag free for the Basic Card Member and up to 8 companions on the same reservation when the reservation includes the member's SkyMiles number.
Delta publishes a second checked bag free benefit on domestic Delta flights.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Delta SkyMiles Platinum American Express Card
notes: First checked bag free for the Basic Card Member and up to 8 companions on the same reservation when the reservation includes the member's SkyMiles number.
Delta publishes a second checked bag free benefit on domestic Delta flights.
Includes a companion certificate after renewal, but that is not part of the bag-value model.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Delta SkyMiles Reserve American Express Card
notes: First checked bag free for the Basic Card Member and up to 8 companions on the same reservation when the reservation includes the member's SkyMiles number.
Delta publishes a second checked bag free benefit on domestic Delta flights.
Includes premium travel benefits outside the bag-fee model.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: JetBlue Plus Card
notes: First checked bag free for the cardholder and up to 3 companions on the same reservation.
Benefit is modeled only for eligible JetBlue-operated flights purchased with the card.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: JetBlue Premier Card
notes: First checked bag free for the cardholder and up to 3 companions on the same reservation.
Benefit is modeled only for eligible JetBlue-operated flights purchased with the card.
Includes premium benefits outside the bag-fee model.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Aeroplan Card
notes: First checked bag free up to 50 lb for the cardmember and up to 8 travel companions on the same reservation.
Benefit applies when travel originates on an Air Canada flight.
The Air Canada bag-fee data is CAD-denominated, so the USD card calculator should be treated as a benefit reference until multi-currency break-even math is added.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Atmos Rewards Ascent Visa Signature Card
notes: Free checked bag for the cardholder and up to 6 guests on the same reservation when the flight is paid for with the card.
Preferred boarding is also published when the flight is paid for with the card.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Atmos Rewards Summit Visa Infinite Card
notes: Free checked bag and preferred boarding for the cardholder and up to 6 guests on the same reservation when the flight is paid for with the card.
Published Summit benefits also include a same-day confirmed change fee waiver on Alaska flights excluding Saver fare.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.

cards.name: Atmos Rewards Visa Business card
notes: Free checked bag for the cardholder and up to 6 guests on the same reservation when the flight is paid for with the card.
Preferred boarding is also published when the flight is paid for with the card.
cards.issuer_disclosure: Issuer terms can change. Verify annual fee, baggage benefit, eligibility, and application terms before applying.
